description_long: This cafe is a modern, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a combination of beige, gray, and stone-textured exterior walls. The front facade features a prominent circular green and white logo above the main entrance, which is framed by a stone accent wall. There is a dedicated outdoor seating area at the front, equipped with several tables shaded by green awnings and enclosed by a metal railing. The building has a large, dark gray roof covering the main customer area, while a lighter, boxy section at the rear likely houses utility or storage spaces. The structure sits on a wide concrete pad, providing ample space for pedestrian access and possibly parking. Large windows and glass doors at the front enhance visibility and invite customers inside.
description: A modern cafe with a flat roof, stone-accented entrance, outdoor seating under green awnings, and a prominent circular logo on the facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large logo, outdoor seating area with green awnings, and stone accent wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the rear utility section, and the edge of the outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, utility section, and the full extent of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outdoor seating area from the back, the metal railing, and the building's side profile.
